protocols.Paper_title: Enterobacter sakazakii bacteriophages can prevent bacterial growth in reconstituted infant formula
protocols.Evidence: Sewage samples were centrifuged, filter-sterilized, and supernatants tested for bacteriophages using overlay and spot assays.

protocols.Paper_title: Enterobacter sakazakii bacteriophages can prevent bacterial growth in reconstituted infant formula
protocols.Evidence: Phage suspensions were purified using centrifugation-based steps and stored for the reported experiments.

protocols.Paper_title: Enterobacter sakazakii bacteriophages can prevent bacterial growth in reconstituted infant formula
protocols.Evidence: Electron micrographs were obtained from phage particles purified by density-gradient centrifugation and negatively stained.

protocols.Paper_title: Enterobacter sakazakii bacteriophages can prevent bacterial growth in reconstituted infant formula
protocols.Evidence: Phage genomic DNA was isolated from purified particles using QIA Lambda Minikit and then analyzed by restriction digestion.

protocols.Paper_title: Enterobacter sakazakii bacteriophages can prevent bacterial growth in reconstituted infant formula
protocols.Evidence: Bacteriophage suspension was pelleted, mixed with SDS-PAGE sample buffer, boiled, and analyzed by SDS-PAGE.
